biological_replicate: Intact brain mitochondria were isolated from C57BL6/J mice...
experimental_design: comparison of complex I content across different mouse tissues
complex I content is 19 ± 1 pmol/mg of protein in the brain mitochondria, whereas varies up to 10-fold in different mouse tissues.
factor_value: tissue type (brain, heart, liver, muscle, kidney)
complex I content varies up to 10-fold in different mouse tissues.
number_of_fractions: Denaturation-induced FMN fluorescence is not instantaneous and takes at least 15 min for the signal to fully develop for 1-mm gels.
